final:
module top_module(
	input clk,
	input hi_value,
	input lo_value,
	output reg hi_val,
	output reg lo_val
	
    );always @(posedge clk) 
	 begin
		hi_val = hi_value;
		lo_val = lo_value;
	 end


  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      hi_val <= ~hi_value; lo_val <= ~lo_value;
    end
  end

endmodule
